allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''dotnet.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*CRM_ALMACEN*'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force; Write-Output \('\\''Detenido PID '\\'' + $_.ProcessId\) }')

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5194 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "Detenido.")
